briefing.title: A calm start. *Series B* narrative review opens at 11.
briefing.summary: The Series B narrative review opens at 11 — Saru, Lin, and Park will press the cohort table for slide 14. Reply to Saru first — the option-pool answer feeds the deck. Lia's pickup is on Sam; your run window is clear at lunch.
briefing.suggested_followup: Draft the redline reply to Saru

cards.title: Saru Patel · *redline* reply
cards.sub: Saru walked the redline with Lin. The option pool and the 1× non-participating preferred need answers.

cards.title: Acuity — *Series B* narrative review
cards.sub: 45 minutes with Saru, Lin, and Park. You closed last call on the pricing slide; the cohort table for slide 14 is still owed.

cards.title: Lia's pickup at 15:30
cards.sub: Sam handles the school run. The 15:30 flag is sharp enough to move the 14:00 with Mara earlier.

cards.title: Owen Reid panel — hold expires
cards.sub: Ashby confirmed three of four panelists. The slot hold expires at 17:00.
